name: slopweaver
description: Build a local-first, zero-key org world model from your GitHub history — ingest it, tier it (bronze→silver→gold), and ask questions of it, all on your machine.

SLOPWEAVER_HOME.title: Slopweaver home
SLOPWEAVER_HOME.description: Where Slopweaver stores your local world model

GITHUB_TOKEN.title: GitHub token (optional)
GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Leave blank to use your existing `gh` CLI login (recommended — no token to manage). Only set this if you don't use the `gh` CLI: a fine-grained read-only PAT.
